baselineAuthority.unsupportedRouteGuard: Unimplemented CP topics must not fall back heuristically to unrelated algorithm routes.

riskRegister.title: Unsupported Clinical Pathology topics must not route heuristically
riskRegister.driftSignal: An unimplemented CP topic resolves to the nearest live algorithm through partial-token matching instead of returning null.
riskRegister.isolationRule: Keep unsupported CP topics unrouted until an owned algorithm record or exact guarded alias is added with proof.

riskRegister.title: Workups label cannot become a generic CTA
riskRegister.driftSignal: `Workups` appears as generic launch, teaser, fallback, or marketing copy rather than the governed diagnostic-workup lane label.
riskRegister.isolationRule: Use `Workups` only when it truthfully names the active diagnostic-workup workspace and bench-facing routing rule.

riskRegister.title: CP source-link and root-count proof must remain untouched
riskRegister.driftSignal: The T07/T08 source-link normalization groups, visible cluster count, or CP root count change during T09 route work.
riskRegister.isolationRule: Do not alter CP source-link normalization, learner source-link wording, visible cluster count, or CP root count inside T09.

riskRegister.title: Source-truth mappings stay outside this route drift tranche
riskRegister.driftSignal: Validated mappings, mapping validators, or normalized algorithm source truth change while isolating route drift.
riskRegister.isolationRule: Treat mapping/source-truth files as read-only for T09 C09; regenerate upstream proof before any intentional change.

completionGate.readyForC10When: C09 packet exists, its focused validation passes, and no guarded source-truth or CP count files were edited.
